tiktok.caption: Two people retire with the same $1M. One runs out in 16 years. It's not bad luck — it's math.

youtube_short.title: Retire in the Wrong Year and Lose $1M
title_alternatives: The 4% Rule's Fatal Flaw Nobody Tells You
Why When You Retire Matters More Than How Much You Save
youtube_short.description: Two people retired the same month with the exact same million dollars saved. Both followed the 4% rule. One ran out of money in just 16 years. The other had $2.1 million by 2025. The only difference was when the market crashed — and most retirement calculators will never warn you about this. It's called sequence of returns risk, and it's one of the most dangerous blind spots in retirement planning. Follow for the money math nobody's teaching you. #retirement #retirementplanning #personalfinance #investing #4percentrule #sequenceofreturns

hook_line: Same $1M saved. One ran out in 16 years.
